user.title: Oppo / Magnetar Player
user.description: Set up your Oppo UDP-20X or Magnetar Blu-Ray player.

data_description.port: Oppo players use 23. Magnetar players use 8102 — leave this at the default and it will be applied automatically, or set it explicitly to override.
data_description.mac: Required for Magnetar players; used to wake the player on power on. Ignored for Oppo players.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the player. Please check the IP address and ensure the player is powered on.
error.invalid_mac: Enter a valid MAC address (e.g. 00:11:22:33:44:55). Required for Magnetar players.

dimmer.name: Cycle dimmer
dimmer.description: Cycle the front-panel display brightness (On / Dim / Off).

pure_audio_toggle.name: Toggle Pure Audio
pure_audio_toggle.description: Toggle Pure Audio mode (disables video output).

info_toggle.name: Toggle on-screen info
info_toggle.description: Show or hide the on-screen display.

audio_language_toggle.name: Cycle audio language
audio_language_toggle.description: Cycle to the next audio language or channel.

subtitle_toggle.name: Cycle subtitle
subtitle_toggle.description: Cycle to the next subtitle language.

eject.name: Eject
eject.description: Toggle the disc tray open or closed.

fast_forward.name: Fast forward
fast_forward.description: Fast forward (cycles through the player's fast-forward speeds).

fast_reverse.name: Fast reverse
fast_reverse.description: Fast reverse (cycles through the player's rewind speeds).

power_toggle.name: Toggle power
power_toggle.description: Toggle the player between on and standby.
